top_claims.claim: Altius Minerals Corporation Provides Earnings Guidance for the Second Quarter of 2026    marketscreener.com

Altius is a diversified royalty platform: producing cash from Chapada copper, Saskatchewan potash (Nutrien/Mosaic), Labrador iron ore dividends, and a fast-growing renewable royalty book, plus venture-style upside in Project Generation and GBR. FY2025 adjusted operating cash flow was CAD 27.5 million (CAD 0.59 per shar
We expect **-15.22%** per year over 7 years at **~$59.91** on **$0.59/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Paying a full scarcity multiple after a +100% year while owner cash yield is near 1%.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Paying a full scarcity multiple after a +100% year while owner cash yield is near 1%.
Commodity reversal: Potash and copper prices normalized lower would cut attributable revenue faster than costs.
Iron ore dividend path: LIORC dividends fell FY2025; prolonged weakness drags consolidated cash.

confirmed_events.title: Altius Minerals Corporation(TSX: ALS) added to S&P/TSX Composite Index - marketscreener.com
